sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11056" key="a)cioprosta/teutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀξιο-προστάτευτος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n11056.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">worthy of command,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:178" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.178</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
